dialogueChunks.intro: Word has reached us about something valuable {location_hint}: a source of {quest_item} richer than anything we have seen in this region. Word is already spreading.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The problem is that we are not the only ones who know. The {enemy_type} have been pushing into that area, and {quest_ally} spotted organized groups heading the same direction. If we do not claim {quest_focus} first, someone else will.
dialogueChunks.outro: I need someone fast and capable to get out there and secure what we need before it is all gone. {player_name}, will you make the trip?

playerResponses.text: What is my cut if I bring it back?
Send someone else. I am busy.

dialogueChunks.intro: {target_npc} lost something irreplaceable. Since {quest_origin}, {quest_focus} has been missing and it means everything to them.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The ones responsible were not ordinary opportunists. They knew exactly what they wanted. {quest_ally} found tracks leading {location_hint}, and the signs match the {enemy_type} we have seen lurking near the borders.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_focus} means everything to {target_npc}. Will you track down {quest_threat} and bring it back, {player_name}?

playerResponses.text: I will bring it home where it belongs.
They deserve what is coming to them.
It is just an object. Let it go.

dialogueChunks.intro: {quest_threat} has swept through the settlement, {player_name}. {quest_ally} says we need {quest_item} that only grows in the wilds {location_hint}, and our stores are empty.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_stakes} are already worsening, and more show signs each day. The resources we need from {quest_focus} cannot survive being shipped from afar: they have to be gathered fresh. The problem is that the gathering grounds are deep in {enemy_type} territory.
dialogueChunks.outro: Without those resources, {quest_stakes} are in mortal danger. {player_name}, will you venture out {quest_time_pressure} and bring back what we need?

playerResponses.text: Lives are at stake. I will go now.
Tell me exactly what to look for.
The wilds are too dangerous right now.
